hff1a92c1gf77eg4c69gaeedg1f89cea0016b: Thought you was busy with the lads in Halsin's grove.
h142a617bga10fg43d6g9505g5f57ca67ddfe: Thought you was busy with the foulbloods in Halsin's grove.
h7c0a5134gc655g4c31ga4cdg6e04afe6b6e4: Suckerpunching strangers - that's your bit, right?
hcdd9de85gabfbg4d4dg88ccg9ed1aaf6c63e: I'm looking for Halsin. Heard you might know where he is?
h83690481g2d34g4b23g9a54g9c18916e5f36: That was just a friendly tap - and you had it coming.
haa90184egdffeg4f66g9493ga9e54b5f2aa0: Still sore about that? You had it coming.
h2dde9ea3ga07fg4957g8253g1b64641a2f9b: Wasn't any of your business, though, was it?
h3b89e84dg72cdg4d73gb52cge0d2ff81bd84: Didn't think this contract could go any worse. Then you showed up.
h48a9f9ffg9fe6g47caga36bg3043e5bb1df9: The goblins need to be dealt with - so I'm dealing with them.
hf82c1317gf458g464cgbd40g4dbf1bd787b3: Bet you will, too. Just like my mates here did.
ha1987dbbg12e4g45c0gb854gd2a50dc82f81: Contract cleverly left out we'd be tits deep in these buggers.
h8f89d0b4g47b0g4e2cga52fgecee3a6b8d7c: I have somewhere else to be.
h332f4bb2ga3aeg4da1gbb3egf7a441ac5c47: Gonna find the wizard who gave us the contract that got my people killed. Left out all the important bits, like 'Beware, treasure's beneath a pile of goblins.'
h86e6c8e7g5fccg4dd3g8068gb804ff28351e: I left as quickly as I could. I don't waste my time with devilspawn.
he66c5b14gbec0g4e49ga0c2g1f81bf5820df: Smart. Those bastards'll spit on your grave after running you through.
h234c3f26g322dg4cf2gaa9fg3feb422b0a10: Tieflings... goblins... gods, this contract was cursed from the first.
h39043b7dga26cg4aedg87b6gef1a6aeb2d09: The kind that leaves half your crew dead.
h90b6c2eega7c1g4ef4gbbc3g91fbb4abd5f2: There's a wizard in Baldur's Gate that'll pay gobloads for a relic supposedly buried round these parts.
h127cb050gab3fg474ag88d9g05ab5f96259d: But gold ain't any use if you're too cold to spend it.
h7b545ed2g9998g4717gb0f5ga38109ed4d43: Let's say I want that gold. Where would I find the relic?
h3869a0b4g47c0g45e8g8a3cg60bc23331b88: It's called the Nightsong. Supposed to be hidden under the temple where the goblins jumped us.
h9b754153g1493g4953gade4gc5047c47ece8: I'd give you a map of the temple and wish you a happy funeral, but my mate Brian kept hold of it like his own todger. Goblins made short of the fat old chunk.
h242d436fg7ab0g4d21g94b3g64feede303e7: All I've got's the contract. Can show you where we turned back, if you feel like dying.
h01ccf30fg3de5g4708g9b18g34ecf9847103: I hear the druid's leader went with you.
h1296b9ddga387g4be0g9db5g125f80cb3e0e: As soon as he heard we had a contract to find that Nightsong relic, he was more eager than a hound in heat.
hc4e0dc8dg11cag4095g836eg934badc6abfb: When the goblins jumped us, most of my crew scarpered, just like I taught 'em to. The old codger didn't.
h04c894eagaba1g4ca8gac44g7876d3c8170f: And you just left him to die?
h5d47733fg5bffg4ab4g8ca3g741f17a77504: Yeah, and I'd do the same again. He weren't my responsibility.
hdb777d3cg14d0g456dgb9d4g7510cb939c8c: If you want to play the hero, go ask the goblins nicely, and maybe they'll give you whatever's left of him.
hb7e8b1edge16dg453fga2d0g125ac8742a1d: Hand over that contract - maybe I'll get the relic and save the druid.
h769d4185g6314g470fg985agea03c6bbeb5b: I'm just glad to be rid of the bloody thing. Happy hunting.
hf6bdd535ge9f9g410fg9820g95b0ae3541a3: Where exactly did you get jumped?
h68f7d915g95fdg4f5egbf7age101f43d1ece: The goblins are holed up in some temple ruins out West. You'll smell 'em or hear their drums before you see 'em.
h4240d2f3g0726g4c25g85b1gbc83e28df82c: I'll take the risk. Give me the contract.
ha2cddc26g93d1g4e83gb37cge3bf59cf1e55: Heh, don't thank me. I'll be well on my way to Baldur's Gate when you die.
h1f663ad0g64e2g47eag891dg85b06a63415d: This whole thing sounds like a setup.
hb252b159g9b1fg4786ga441gb499da7c6495: That, or a crock of shite.
h6ed06ff4gbbe8g4028ga77bgb2f87e36ca2c: Before you go, I'd like to say a prayer for your crew.
h92132e56g406fg4059g873dgfd781b8062dc: The Black Hand strikes, and culls the unworthy. Yield in life, lest he reach for you even in death.
h309f65b5gb5a7g426bg857bg8104c82f3174: Say another word, and I'll 'cull' you before you can blink.
hab18e916ge94cg4f15gb61eg643470d59c51: Lord of Murder, I dedicate their blood to you. Praise those who spilled it!
hc4ce414bg8250g4dacgbf6eg3e374b66b822: Great. I've been wasting my breath on a Bhaal lunatic.
h1bbfc7a9gadb4g49c7g8fabg7851cf9fc16c: May they find peace now, they who died fighting so others may live. We honour them as protectors.
hbe5147c7ga1a3g47bdgab46g8362ce8f9690: That's true. Without these lads, we'd've been cooked.
h67b70e09g2c28g4b72g87ceg26e08e181b84: Pretty good point, for a religious type. Which one's your god again?
h1bb2b2abg9dedg48efgae40g61431ee9bb0c: Your man Helm seems to know what he's talking about.
h5b3b5d88g76c8g421aga464g835fe1ffc94f: He'll make himself known to you when you are ready.
h5877b6afg6fdag4187gae0bg73d61cd9c167: Would that we had taken these blows in their place - but let us honour their suffering.
hf05a27bag54a0g4cc6g9701ge2a4374a0f3f: This was a good crew. They deserved better.
hfecd207bgb392g4c69gadcdg8d1eed33ae6e: Their death is but another step on the path. Kelemvor will judge them fairly.
h8bf02065g6ac6g4d93g8885gf8501bb39e9d: Nothing the lads would hate more than a judge waiting for 'em up there.
hc1ed32c5g7f52g49a4g9793gb467a9550cbd: These vessels are a reminder that death walks behind each of us, every day. None can outrun him. Praise Myrkul.
h6d0f7913g37b6g4b85g9b37g72eca2c3986a: We're leaving. Don't follow, if you know what's good for you.
h57a0f80bg39e1g40ccgbdd6ge43124ea7388: May their journey onwards be filled with as many wonders as they enjoyed in life.
h8ccb24f2ge14bg470bgb54fge5d9354cf14f: Whatever doubts and mysteries plagued them in life, may they be answered in death.
hac1e831bg607fg474eg81f0g0c2d976498c2: Folks like us ain't got unanswered questions. We got contracts to finish and mouths to feed.
hb419893bg8ef4g402dg85f7g85a06970de13: May their path into the next plane be illuminated by a thousand gentle lights.
h81d90b9eg4752g4abdg9a29g0b96d368886f: I commend them to the darkness. When night falls, let them be forgotten.
haf099354g7d16g41d9g8144gd8edaae307ab: Hard to forget idiots like these. I don't think I'll bother trying.
h25f1cf5ag3e13g4085gb532gdc8c31665587: May their blades be ever sharp, and their arrows ever true. We honour them, for they fought to the last.
h4103d35fg6946g4d7cgbe92g2e19c2d3626a: That's true, isn't it. My crew gave those nasty little shites as good as they got.
h57b4e8f5gf1bcg42d5g9f71gf69023ced481: Good point. For a religious type. Which one's your god again?
h275c2aa9gbaa5g418agaf24ga174387668b2: I serve Tyr, god of justice.
h7f865859gcdcbg4951g8e7cg55fb4d802567: I serve Tempus, god of war.
h18e7772bg6a2eg4147g95e7gc44a08703506: Your man Tyr knows what he's talking about.
h25440a60g4bf4g49e7ga1feg462dfc71f5eb: Your man Tempus knows what he's talking about.
hcafd1bd8gbebeg4db6gad12g8e304d6c77b4: Stay true to your blade, and you will know his name soon enough.
heb5a3bacg7ee6g4a3cg9ebag9beaa60afa39: Though I do not know how they lived, I know they died justly in combat. I honour that death.
hd3b8fbdfgdac8g495egb4bbg2fcfff11263a: An adventurer's life is often short, but full of glory. May their journey onward be their next great adventure.
ha26b944fgc18ag4a2cg890ag784232c240a0: Save your breath. They're too dead to hear you.
h16ad896fg4300g4c61ga828g3cf8d62ff3a3: Look, we're getting out of here. You should do the same.
h462dd624ged4bg44bbg9404gc89627e65dec: Forget it. Let's just get out of here.
ha2e8d7c9gb3beg4ed3g84d4gc07efbe028b4: See you on the road, mate.
h8914b665g5b9dg4e20ga279gee5b29a71609: You're giving up? I might take a shot at it myself.
h281a8000g3561g4f51g831dge354ba9f4ffc: Have at it, if you think you can do better.
h886d97d1g4880g40feg8dabgfd50a31fab1a: True. I wouldn't risk it for twice the gold.
hfd532c21g45b4g482cg943age8215959bd4b: Dunno what I expected. That much gold for some long-lost relic buried in the arse-end of nowhere. ([GEN_CheckMagicPocketGold_6057ad05-9492-4630-9f0a-be548b134c54])
h81ae396egf6e0g488bga0e9g7418033eb29a: And from a wizard too. I shoulda known. The gold probably turns to lead the moment you leave Baldur's Gate.
h7c7a409cg0c77g4ce5g88f7g6460ba9ac06b: A few goblins killed your whole crew? Pathetic.
h727f2535gde70g4f78gac33g5bc357ce10f5: Wasn't no few goblins, mate. There's an entire hive of 'em. Contract failed to mention that part.
h17ff24d4g5206g4bf3g864aga64652218af6: I thought you were busy leading your crew.
h944813d8g057cg4f90g9d26gd4bb55be1a45: Contract didn't mention no goblins. I would've prepped the lads, brought better weapons...
